title: Item Info Plates
description: Simple client-side mod to render the name of an item above it
body:
# Item Info Plates

Item info plates is an extremely simple client-side mod to render an Item's registry/actual name (as opposed to anvil/custom name). It also has the capability to render the name in the color of the item's rarity, and the first enchantment on enchanted books, of which the latter is only available in singleplayer.
